name: Mail
description: Integrated mail client for Hecos. Reads SMTP/IMAP profiles, manages drafts, sending, and syncing with automatic provider support and Address Book integration.

commands.sync_emails: Synchronizes the mailbox by fetching new messages via IMAP.
commands.send_email: Sends an email using the SMTP client. Supports HTML, text, and attachments.
commands.list_emails: Lists emails from the inbox or a specified folder.
commands.get_email: Retrieves a single email by ID with full body and attachments.

function.name: MAIL__send_email
function.description: Sends an email to one or more recipients. Use when the user says 'send an email', 'manda una mail', 'scrivi a [name]', 'write to [email]'. Supports plain text and HTML body, CC, BCC.

to.description: Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses.

body.description: Email body content. Can be plain text or HTML.

function.name: MAIL__sync_emails
function.description: Fetches and syncs new emails from the IMAP server. Use when the user says 'check my email', 'sync mail', 'controlla le email', 'nuove email?'.

folder.description: Optional: IMAP folder to sync (default: INBOX).

function.name: MAIL__list_emails
function.description: Lists emails from the inbox or specified folder. Use when the user asks 'show my emails', 'mostrami le email', 'lista messaggi', 'ultime email'.

limit.description: Optional: max number of emails to return (default: 20).

function.name: MAIL__get_email
function.description: Retrieves a single email by its ID. Use when the user asks to read or open a specific message.

email_id.description: The unique ID of the email to retrieve.
